mandate: Correct, efficient, and standard-compliant usage of WebRTC APIs within Chromium.

checklist.check_api_usage: Ensure proper configuration of `webrtc::PeerConnection` and associated factories. Validate ICE server configurations, signaling negotiation, and data channel management.
checklist.check_threading_model: WebRTC has its own internal threading model (network, worker, signaling threads). Ensure thread-safety when bridging Chromium's `base::SequencedTaskRunner` with WebRTC's threading constraints. Avoid blocking the signaling thread.
checklist.check_resource_management: Validate lifetime management of WebRTC objects, ensuring proper teardown to prevent memory leaks and dangling sockets.
checklist.check_media_streams: Ensure safe handling of audio and video tracks, focusing on efficient capture, pacing, and packetization.
